summary: Phase 62 admin menu regression — UI runtime testing BLOCKED (preview env returned 'Preview Unavailable!!!' on https://schoolfocus.preview.emergentagent.com/login, app asleep). Performed comprehensive static code review of all 8 referenced files. Sidebar refactor, redirects, settings groups, lecturer-profile composition, and náslech mutual exclusion are correctly implemented at the source level. ONE structural defect found: LecturerProfilePage renders <UnifiedAvailabilityPage/> and <MyProfilePage/> directly, but BOTH children internally wrap themselves in <AdminLayout>, producing TWO AdminLayouts (two sidebars, two mobile bottom navs, two ImpersonationBanners, two <main> elements) on /admin/lecturer-profile.

ui_bugs.issue: Renders <UnifiedAvailabilityPage/> + <MyProfilePage/> as siblings, but each child internally wraps in <AdminLayout>. Result: two sidebars, two mobile bottom navs, two ImpersonationBanners, duplicated <main> regions and likely two role badges/logout buttons on /admin/lecturer-profile. Affects LP-1 acceptance: data-testid='lecturer-profile-page' DOES contain both sub-pages, but the page is structurally broken.

issues: Likely double sidebar/bottom-nav render due to nested AdminLayouts (see ui_bugs above)

action_items: FIX LecturerProfilePage.js: refactor to render ONE <AdminLayout> wrapper and inline the *content* of UnifiedAvailabilityPage + MyProfilePage (extract their inner JSX to shared sub-components, e.g. <AvailabilityCalendarSection/> and <MyProfileSections/>), so /admin/lecturer-profile renders a single layout shell. Current implementation produces duplicated layout chrome.

VERIFY runtime once preview env is awake: (a) sidebar shows 8 flat items + Správa group (Školy, Zpětná vazba) + Superadmin only for demo@/admin@budezivo.cz; (b) nav-availability / nav-my-profile / nav-team count==0; (c) /admin/availability and /admin/my-profile redirect to /admin/lecturer-profile; (d) settings-group-{general,access,billing,legal,system} all render; (e) náslech mutual exclusion toggleSupported↔toggleLearning still works after save+reload.
Wake the preview environment (https://app.emergent.sh) so the next testing iteration can perform live Playwright e2e on the new sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: LecturerProfilePage.js (lines 26-35): rendering both <UnifiedAvailabilityPage/> and <MyProfilePage/> directly produces TWO <AdminLayout> wrappers because each sub-page already calls <AdminLayout>{...children...}</AdminLayout> internally (MyProfilePage.js line 121, UnifiedAvailabilityPage similarly). The wrapper data-testid='lecturer-profile-page' will pass a presence check but the user will see duplicated sidebar / mobile bottom-nav / role badge / logout button. This violates a clean UI composition and likely breaks responsive layout. Suggested fix: extract content (JSX inside <AdminLayout>) into separate exported components (e.g. UnifiedAvailabilityContent, MyProfileContent), keep MyProfilePage/UnifiedAvailabilityPage as <AdminLayout>+<Content> for their own routes, and have LecturerProfilePage render <AdminLayout><AvailabilityContent/><MyProfileContent/></AdminLayout>.

AdminLayout.js getNavItems() (line 80-134): correctly removes nav-availability, nav-my-profile, nav-team from baseItems; nav-mailings label='Propagace'; nav-events inserted only when eventsEnabled with label='Akce' and testId='nav-events'. Group filtering preserves spravaGroup with children Školy + Zpětná vazba. Lektor role correctly sees only [Přehled, Rezervace, Lektorský profil] — no Tým, no Nastavení, no Správa group (correct per ROLE-1).
AdminLayout.js (lines 106-110): Superadmin nav item correctly gated to user.email in {demo@budezivo.cz, admin@budezivo.cz} — matches ROLE-2.

App.js (lines 157-188): /admin/my-profile and /admin/availability both wrap <Navigate to='/admin/lecturer-profile' replace/> in <ProtectedRoute>. This is correct but causes a tiny race: ProtectedRoute will check auth first, then immediately redirect; verify in runtime that no flash of TeamPage/auth screen occurs.

SettingsPage.js (lines 108-114): SETTINGS_GROUPS = [general, access, billing, legal, system] matches SETTINGS-1. Render at lines 472-511 correctly skips empty groups, so the 'system' group (only 'audit') still shows because audit exists. settings-payment is correctly gated on eventsEnabled (line 458).

MyProfilePage.js (lines 70-85): toggleSupported and toggleLearning both perform mutual exclusion via setOpposite(prev => prev.filter(x !== pid)). This satisfies EXCL-1; persistence to DB depends on PATCH /api/team/{id}/lecturer-profile (line 92) — backend route untouched per request, so EXCL-2 should be intact.
MyProfilePage.js still wraps itself in <AdminLayout> at line 121 — combined with LecturerProfilePage composition above, this is the root cause of the duplicated-layout bug.

AdminLayout.js mobile bottom nav (lines 316-349): correctly filters out collapsible groups with `flatItems = navItems.filter(item => item.type !== 'group')` — Správa won't appear in mobile bottom nav, which matches the spec.
Files >700 lines: SettingsPage.js is ~1700 lines (already flagged in earlier iterations) — recommend splitting by section render functions into separate components in a future cleanup.

success_rate.backend: N/A (no API tests run; pre-existing pytest_my_profile_and_naslech_removal.py from iter61 not re-executed because preview env is asleep and request was UI-only regression)
success_rate.frontend: Static review only — preview environment unreachable

test_credentials: demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026! (used in attempted run; login screen never loaded due to 'Preview Unavailable')
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Wake preview at https://schoolfocus.preview.emergentagent.com/ before running Playwright (got 'Preview Unavailable!!!' page on this run). 2) PRIMARY bug to verify: /admin/lecturer-profile likely renders TWO sidebars / two mobile bottom-navs because LecturerProfilePage renders both UnifiedAvailabilityPage AND MyProfilePage as siblings, and each of those wraps itself in <AdminLayout> internally. Take a full-page screenshot of /admin/lecturer-profile and count [data-testid='nav-dashboard'] occurrences — should be 1, will currently be 2. 3) After main agent fixes, re-run the original Playwright script that was prepared in this iteration (it covers NAV-1..5, REDIR-1..3, LP-1, SETTINGS-1..3, EXCL-1, PROP-1, AKCE-1).
rca of the issue: Cause of double-AdminLayout: LecturerProfilePage.js was implemented as a thin composition (<UnifiedAvailabilityPage/> + <MyProfilePage/>), but the design assumed those were content-only components. In reality both are page-level components that already include <AdminLayout>{content}</AdminLayout>. Stacking them produces nested layout chrome. Fix: extract their JSX bodies to content-only sub-components and have a single AdminLayout in LecturerProfilePage.
